title: Raw Wind in Eden
writer: Dan Lundberg, Elizabeth Wilson, Richard Wilson
actors: Esther Williams, Jeff Chandler, Rossana Podestà
plot: On a small Mediterranean island live Costanza, her father Urbano, and beachcomber Moore, whom she plans to marry. Into this Eden come two plane crash survivors, supermodel Laura and her playboy friend Wally. The shapely, worldly L...
